cards.front: What is the purpose of error detection and correction in data transmission?
cards.back: To detect and correct errors that occur during data transmission, ensuring reliable data transfer

cards.front: What type of codes are used for error detection and correction?
What is the main difference between block codes and cyclic codes?
cards.back: Block codes divide data into fixed-length blocks, while cyclic codes are based on cyclic shifts of the data

cards.front: What is the main advantage of cyclic codes?
cards.back: Cyclic codes are more efficient in terms of bandwidth and can be easily implemented with shift registers

cards.front: What is the minimum Hamming distance required for a code to be considered reliable?
